docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO OCT-10-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF THUY DIEP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TINGJUN WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUIRES A CANTONESE INTERPRETER AT THE OPENING OF THE CALENDAR AND A CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-10-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-10-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF THUY DIEP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TINGJUN WANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY THEIR OWN NON-CERTIFIED COURT CANTONESE INTERPRETER FRANCES HA. CLERK G. FELICIANO ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO FRANCES HA. DEFENDANT TINGJUN WANG INDICATED SHE WAS ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS TINGJUN WONG. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIEP, THUY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIEP, THUY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, TINGJUN $320.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00, SEE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM---DEFENDANT TO PAY $320 BUT RETAIN TITLE TO REFRIGERATOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, TINGJUN
